sections.heading: What is an Interest Calculator?
sections.content: Our Online Interest Calculator helps you find out how much interest you will earn on savings and investments or pay on loans. Whether you need a Simple Interest Calculator or a Compound Interest Calculator, this tool gives you accurate results instantly. You can use it as a Loan Interest Calculator, Savings Interest Calculator, Investment Interest Calculator, or Bank Interest Calculator – all in one place.

subSections.heading: Simple Interest (SI)
subSections.content: Calculated only on the principal amount. Formula: SI = (Principal × Rate × Time) ÷ 100

subSections.heading: Compound Interest (CI)
subSections.content: Calculated on the principal plus accumulated interest. Formula: A = P × (1 + R/100)^T

subSections.heading: Why Use Interest Calculators?
subSections.content: Daily, Monthly, and Annual Interest Calculators help you plan better for loans, savings, and investments.

sections.heading: How to Use the Interest Calculator (Step by Step)

subSections.heading: Step 1: Enter Principal Amount
subSections.content: Type the loan or investment amount.

subSections.heading: Step 2: Enter Interest Rate
subSections.content: Provide the annual percentage rate (APR).

subSections.heading: Step 3: Select Time Period
subSections.content: Choose the duration in months or years.

subSections.heading: Step 4: Choose Interest Type
subSections.content: Select either Simple Interest or Compound Interest.

subSections.heading: Step 5: Click Calculate
subSections.content: See total interest earned/paid and final balance.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Investment Growth

subSections.heading: Step 1: Enter Initial Investment
subSections.content: Start with the base amount you plan to invest.

subSections.heading: Step 2: Add Contributions
subSections.content: Fill in your Annual and/or Monthly contribution.

subSections.heading: Step 3: Contribution Timing
subSections.content: Select whether you contribute at the beginning or end of each period.

subSections.heading: Step 4: Set Interest & Compounding
subSections.content: Enter the Interest rate and choose compounding frequency.

subSections.heading: Step 5: Enter Investment Duration
subSections.content: Specify length in years and months.

subSections.heading: Step 6: Add Optional Factors
subSections.content: Include Tax and Inflation rates for more accurate results.

subSections.heading: Step 7: Click Calculate
subSections.content: See your investment summary, growth, total interest, and buying power after inflation.

sections.content: This tool helps you estimate your investment growth, total interest, and buying power after inflation. Adjust the values to plan your financial future smartly!

subSections.heading: Simple Interest Example
subSections.content: Investment: $10,000 at 8% annual interest for 5 years. SI = (10,000 × 8 × 5) ÷ 100 = $4,000. Final Amount = $14,000.

subSections.heading: Compound Interest Example
subSections.content: Investment: $10,000 at 8% annual interest for 5 years (yearly compounding). A = 10,000 × (1 + 0.08)^5 = $14,693. Compound interest gives $693 more than simple interest.

sections.heading: Benefits of Using Our Interest Calculator

subSections.heading: Fast & Accurate
subSections.content: Instant results without manual calculations.

subSections.heading: Compare SI vs CI
subSections.content: See the difference between simple and compound interest easily.

subSections.heading: Works for All Cases
subSections.content: Loans, savings, FDs, mortgages, and investments.

subSections.heading: Supports Flexible Modes
subSections.content: Daily, monthly, and yearly interest calculations.

subSections.heading: Versatile Usage
subSections.content: Perfect for home loans, car loans, credit cards, business loans, and EMIs.

faq.q: What is the formula for simple interest?
What is the formula for compound interest?
Can I use this calculator for loans and savings both?
faq.a: Yes, our tool works as a Loan Interest Calculator, Savings Interest Calculator, Investment Calculator, and Mortgage Interest Calculator.
